SacredStatics
Fundraiser static ads
New CampaignCampaignsMemory

Creative Brain

Global fundraiser memory: prompts, angles, and keyed notes used in ad generation and batch runs.
Paste example visual prompts or short descriptions that performed well (one per line or freeform). Up to 6 active donation swipe entries also merge into the same seed pool + structured context on Generate 5 ads.
One angle per line. Batches randomize from this list.
Each row is saved as KEY = definition. Keys must start with VAR_. On Generate 5 ads, Claude randomly mixes 0–3 of these per slot with template keys (unless you define keys here — then only your list is used). VAR_ADD_TEXT and VAR_NO_TEXT are never applied together on the same slot.
Global lines (no = on the line): notes that apply broadly. Use KEY = value per line for template overrides only: UGC_SNAPCHAT, NATIVE_ORGANIC, HYPER_CLICKBAIT, CREATIVE_CONCEPT, ILLUSTRATED, KLING_VIDEO. Variation keys belong in the section above.
Saved swipe bank (fundraiser)
Categories: 8 • Entries: 8 • Active (pulled into batches): 8. Each Generate 5 ads run includes up to 6 active entries (by performance score, then newest) as structured swipe context and random prompt seeds alongside Creative Brain + evaluations.
Open swipe bank admin
